name: checkbox
title: Checkbox
description: Terminal-styled checkbox with [x] and bullet variants. Standalone or CheckboxGroup with headless focus and keyboard hooks.

content.text: CheckboxItem must be used within CheckboxGroup
CheckboxItem must be used within CheckboxGroup

content.text: This checkbox has additional descriptive text below the label.

docs.description: Terminal-styled checkbox with [x] and bullet variants. Standalone or CheckboxGroup with headless focus and keyboard hooks.

anatomy.name: CheckboxGroup
anatomy.note: Multi-select group with context and keyboard navigation

anatomy.name: CheckboxItem
anatomy.note: Group-aware checkbox that reads context for state

notes.title: Indeterminate State
notes.content: Checkbox supports a third state: checked='indeterminate' renders [-] (x variant) or [ - ] (bullet variant). This is useful for parent checkboxes representing partially-selected groups.

notes.title: External Navigation
notes.content: CheckboxGroup is headless for keyboard behavior. Wire arrow-key focus from your app layer using highlighted, onHighlightChange, and onKeyDown (see checkbox-group example for @diffgazer/keys integration). Space toggling is handled by each CheckboxItem.

notes.title: Strikethrough (Checklist Mode)
notes.content: Pass strikethrough to Checkbox or CheckboxGroup to apply line-through styling and muted color to checked item labels. This replaces the former Checklist component with full checkbox features (variants, sizes, keyboard nav, accessibility).

keyboard.description: CheckboxGroup exposes headless keyboard hooks. Integrate @diffgazer/keys (or your own handler) by controlling highlighted and handling onKeyDown at the group level. Standalone Checkbox responds to Space when focused (per WAI-ARIA APG checkbox pattern).
